source: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — colorful keyboard SVGs
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
subject: Top-down cluster of six GMK CYL keycaps laid out as if just tipped from a kit (two staggered rows, with a 1.25u modifier and a stray 1u accent cap), with the centered back-row cap painted deep Prussian red as the focal 'alert' piece
prompt: Match the visual rhythm of mode-sonnet-r2-group-buy-coverage.svg — 2px warm-grey stroke, single-color splash, soft elliptical wash behind the subject. Subject for a keycap-set GB news piece is a stacked-cap silhouette per the news pillar's headline-shape directive. Six caps in CYL profile (slightly inset top surface plus a gentle scoop arc to read the cylindrical dish), arranged as two staggered rows so the cluster fills ~85% width × ~75% height. The focal back-row middle cap takes the deep Prussian red splash; a small alert-pip echo sits just outside it, mirroring the Sonnet hero's brass-dot move. Splash hue is the muted Prussian variant (oklch 0.5 0.16 22) rather than cherry red, to honor the article's Bauhaus / parchment-and-deep-red read.
